channel.title: Rusts on Happygrammer Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Rusts on Happygrammer Blog

item.title: [Rust] 설치하기
item.description: 리눅스, 맥OS 환경이면 명령 인터페이스 1줄로 Rust 설치가 가능합니다. Rust 설치 명령어 Rust 설치는 rustup를 다운로드 하여 설치합니다. curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh 설치 과정 Welcome to Rust! This will download and install the official compiler for the Rust programming language, and its package manager, Cargo. It will add the cargo, rustc, rustup and other commands to Cargo's bin directory, located at: /Users/smarthome/.cargo/bin This can be modified with the CARGO_HOME environment variable.
